heading: Retired rank and pay held pursuant to other laws unaffected
label: 3047 Retired rank and pay held pursuant to other laws unaffected
text: Nothing in this subchapter shall prevent an officer from being placed on the retired list with the highest rank and with the highest retired pay to which the officer is entitled under any other provision of law.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 853q of this titlePub. L. 107–372
